summary: Frontend testing of CommessaHubPage refactored components. Found and fixed critical bug: CostRow component was missing, causing page crash for commesse with cost data.

ui_bugs.issue: CostRow component was not defined - caused ReferenceError crash when commessa has cost analysis data

issues: Console warning: span cannot be child of option/select - minor hydration warning from Radix UI

critical_code_review_comments: CostRow component was used but never defined in CommessaHubPage.js - added the missing component definition
context_for_next_testing_agent: CommessaHubPage refactoring verified. All components working: NextStepCard, CommessaActionsMenu, accordions, dialogs, lifecycle bar. Fixed missing CostRow component.

components_verified.commessa_info_card: PASS - shows numero, title, client, stato, value
components_verified.next_step_card: PASS - renders state-based guidance with correct action buttons
components_verified.commessa_actions_menu: PASS - dropdown opens with all document generation options
components_verified.quick_actions_sidebar: PASS - shows Chiudi senza certificazione and Sospendi

dialogs_verified.qr_code_dialog: PASS - opens when clicking QR button
dialogs_verified.event_confirmation_dialog: PASS - opens with note textarea and confirm button
